About
Commercial strategist working at the intersection of growth, data, and product.
Growth & Key Accounts Manager at Teads and Advisory Board Member. The work here spans strategic analysis, pricing tools, automated reporting, and design thinking — each project shaped by a curiosity about how things could be better.

Kaizen — continuous improvement — is the operating principle. Born in New Zealand, based in London.
Growth Strategy Key Accounts Data & BI Pricing Ad Tech Python Looker UX / Design
